text_block_list.text: ...I did. I think I ran the best I could...

text_block_list.text: ...Yes. Since my ultimate goal lies beyond that...
choice_data_list: We're gonna have to try even harder.

Trainer... I won't be able to do this without your

text_block_list.text:
We can find our way there together... To the

more effort...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Yes. We'll get first place together...
